stemHtml: Which statement is correct regarding following the failure of a FMC/FMGC in a dual system?

options.a: Data must be recovered using the quick recovery procedure for the failed FMC/FMGC in the QRH.
options.b: The data from the failed unit is replaced by the data from the operative FMC/FMGC.
options.c: The airline MOC will give you instructions via ACARS.
options.d: The associated CDU/MCDU is not usable anymore for the remainder of the flight.
